title: Passing constants to a parameterized CDS view
description: Passing constants to a parameterized CDS view. Key topics: A non-parameterized view can consume a parameterized view. Syntax: view_name( param1: 'value1', param2: 'value2' ). This is useful for creating pre-filtered views (e.g. by agency).

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆A non-parameterized view can consume a parameterized view
◆Syntax: view_name( param1: 'value1', param2: 'value2' )
◆This is useful for creating pre-filtered views (e.g. by agency)
◆Alternative: pass $parameters.variable to forward ABAP params
◆@Semantics annotations must be re-declared at each view layer

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆A non-parameterized view can consume a parameterized view
◆Syntax: view_name( param1: 'value1', param2: 'value2' )
◆This is useful for creating pre-filtered views (e.g. by agency)
◆Alternative: pass $parameters.variable to forward ABAP params
◆@Semantics annotations must be re-declared at each view layer

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_PARAM_C'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Parameterized view with constants'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM_CONST
  as select from ZPRAC_CDS_PARAM( p1_travel_id: '00000009', p2_agency_id: '070032' )
{
  key TravelId,
      AgencyId,
      CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      TotalPrice,
      CurrencyCode,
      Description
}
details:
by passing constant values for the parameters

for proper downstream consumption (OData, Analytics)

WHEN TO USE:

- Creating a fixed-reporting view filtered by specific criteria

- Creating a layer of pre-filtered abstractions on parameterized views

- Testing with hardcoded test data during development
topic: View on a parameterized view using hardcoded values
